# khai methods index

Every method khai packages, each attributed to its origin and ready to run. 11 methods across 6 types. Built from each method's frontmatter, so the index and the methods cannot drift.

## By type

### analysis (4)

- [**EPIC**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/epic.md) (`epic`): Kai Schlüter (2012). [EPIC SCAN in GLUE](https://socialea.blogspot.com/2012/10/epic-scan-in-glue.html). Prompts: Emergent · Perverse · Irreducible · Contrived.
- [**PACE**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/pace.md) (`pace`): Kai Schlüter (2012). [PACE SCAN](https://socialea.blogspot.com/2012/10/pace-scan.html). Prompts: People · Adaption · Communication · Empathic.
- [**SCAN**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/scan.md) (`scan`): Tom Graves (2013). [SCAN: sensemaking and decision-making (Tetradian)](https://weblog.tetradian.com/tag/scan/). Prompts: Simple · Complicated · Ambiguous · Not-known.
- [**WISE**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/wise.md) (`wise`): Kai Schlüter (2012). [WISE SCAN](https://socialea.blogspot.com/2012/10/wise-scan.html). Prompts: Worth · Informed · Simple · Environment.

### authoring (1)

- [**khai Authoring**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/khai-authoring.md) (`khai-authoring`): KAI HACKS AI (2026). Order: Computed, Harnessed, Instructed. Prompts: Vector · Cut · Fit · Floor.

### fix (1)

- [**khai Fix**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/khai-fix.md) (`khai-fix`): KAI HACKS AI (2026). Order: Computed, Harnessed, Instructed. Prompts: Confirm · Weigh · Apply · Reverify.

### planning (1)

- [**OODA Loop**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/ooda-loop.md) (`ooda-loop`): John Boyd (1996). [The Essence of Winning and Losing](https://danford.net/boyd/). Prompts: Observe · Orient · Decide · Act.

### retrospective (3)

- [**4 L's Retrospective**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/retro-4ls.md) (`retro-4ls`): Mary Gorman & Ellen Gottesdiener (2012). Discover to Deliver. Prompts: Liked · Learned · Lacked · Longed for.
- [**Starfish Retrospective**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/retro-starfish.md) (`retro-starfish`): Pat Kua (2006). [Retrospective Coaching Cards](https://www.thekua.com/rant/2006/03/the-retrospective-starfish/). Prompts: Keep doing · Less of · More of · Start doing · Stop doing.
- [**Start, Stop, Continue**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/retro-start-stop-continue.md) (`retro-start-stop-continue`): Traditional agile practice. Prompts: Start · Stop · Continue.

### review (1)

- [**khai Review**](../packages/khai-methods/methods/khai-review.md) (`khai-review`): KAI HACKS AI (2026). Order: Computed, Harnessed, Instructed. Prompts: Lenses · Judge · Consensus · Escalate.
